phrases.intent_en: Ask where the National Palace entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza a entrada do Palácio Nacional?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee see lo-ka-LEE-za ah en-TRA-da doo-pa-LA-see-oo (link) na-see-O-nal?
phrases.cultural_note: The palace entrance features iconic twin chimneys visible from the street, a landmark of Sintra.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, a entrada fica junto à praça.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AH ayngt-RAH-duh FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH PRAH-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, the entrance is right by the square.

responses.english: Good day, the entrance is right by the square.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AH ayngt-RAH-duh FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH PRAH-suh.
responses.local: Bom dia, a entrada fica junto à praça.

likely_response.local: A Pastelaria Piriquita fica perto do Largo da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH pee-ree-KEE-tuh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Pastelaria Piriquita is near Largo da República square.

responses.english: Pastelaria Piriquita is near Largo da República square.
responses.phonetic: AH puhsh-tih-luh-REEUH pee-ree-KEE-tuh FEE-kuh PEHR-too DOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.local: A Pastelaria Piriquita fica perto do Largo da República.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Palácio Nacional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a entrada do Palácio Nacional.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the entrance of the National Palace.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the entrance of the National Palace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a entrada do Palácio Nacional.

phrases.cultural_note: Pastelaria Piriquita is famous for its travesseiros (pillow pastries), a must-try in Sintra.

likely_response.local: No Largo da República, perto da calçada portuguesa.
likely_response.pronunciation: NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh, PEHR-too DUH kahl-SAH-duh poo-ruh-too-GEH-zuh.
likely_response.translation_en: At Largo da República, near the Portuguese pavement.

responses.english: At Largo da República, near the Portuguese pavement.
responses.phonetic: NOO LAH-ruh-goo DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh, PEHR-too DUH kahl-SAH-duh poo-ruh-too-GEH-zuh.
responses.local: No Largo da República, perto da calçada portuguesa.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find chocalharia shops
phrases.text_local: Onde ficam as lojas de chocalharia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuhng UHSH LOH-zhuhsh DIH shoo-kuh-lyuh-REEUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Chocalharia is the traditional craft of making cowbells and livestock bells, a cultural heritage of Sintra region. The shops on Rua da Ferraria are known for these handcrafted items.

likely_response.local: Na Rua da Ferraria, próximo ao Largo da República.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUH ROOUH DUH feh-ruh-REEUH, PRAW-see-moo OW LAH-ruh-goo DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
likely_response.translation_en: On Rua da Ferraria, near Largo da República square.

responses.english: On Rua da Ferraria, near Largo da República square.
responses.phonetic: NUH ROOUH DUH feh-ruh-REEUH, PRAW-see-moo OW LAH-ruh-goo DUH reh-POOB-lee-kuh.
responses.local: Na Rua da Ferraria, próximo ao Largo da República.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where traditional chocalharia shops are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão as oficinas tradicionais de chocalhos por aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN UHSH aw-fee-SEE-nuhsh truh-dee-seeoo-NEYESH DIH shoo-KAH-lyoosh POOR uh-KEE?
phrases.cultural_note: Traditional chocalharia workshops preserve centuries-old metalworking techniques specific to Portuguese rural culture.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para as oficinas de chocalhos.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH aw-fee-SEE-nuhsh DIH shoo-KAH-lyoosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the chocalho workshops.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the chocalho workshops.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh UHSH aw-fee-SEE-nuhsh DIH shoo-KAH-lyoosh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para as oficinas de chocalhos.

likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the National Palace.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the National Palace.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW puh-LAHS-yoo nuh-seeoo-NAHL.
responses.local: Siga as placas para o Palácio Nacional.
